features.name: resetall clearing text macros across modules
features.description: Code should include a `resetall directive placed between two modules, where macros defined via -D or internally (like SYNTHESIS) are checked with `ifdef in the second module after resetall

features.name: ifdef else checking preserved macro after resetall
features.description: Code should include an `ifdef/`else/`endif block that checks a text macro after a `resetall directive, testing whether macros are properly preserved per Verilog-2005 spec
